name: Special Division 4 || The Endless 8th Floor ||
description:
A mission against the Eternity Devil. Desperate, you'll all search for a way to escape together… At the cost of killing Denji!

Public Safety Devil Hunter POV.

<< REQUEST BOT >>

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Unfortunately, there are no other images of the original Special Division 4 apart from the previous one, so I had no choice but to make a crappy collab for the profile picture (not anymore).


05/11/26 Revamp: This bot has been updated with its corresponding lorebook and a new intro message more faithful to the manga story in the Eternity Devil arc. The bot's personality now only narrates the events of the introductory arc, Bat Devil, and Eternity Devil. I also included missing secondary characters via lorebook such as Arai, and some instructions the bot must follow.

Sequel: An Izakaya Night.

WARNING: You must use more advanced LLMs such as Gemini, Deepseek, or others are needed for it to function correctly. JLLM sucks.
